name: RMW - MP7
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - Designed to defeat Kevlar, it sports its own unique ammo type, the 4.6×30mm Nato. Altought its compatible with 9mm, and 45 acp with modifications. The Combine Empire approves of this submachine gun. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
